description: Regularly partaking in penetration tests across various client environments. Developing own project in security hardening & hardening automation. Focus on Web Security Academy with the goal of becoming Burp Suite Certified Practitioner.

role: Lead Architect — Cyber Security Risk Intelligence Platform
description: Led the architecture and implementation of BASF's internal quantitative cyber risk platform from the ground up. Designed modular metric systems, cost-benefit models, and ML-powered automation pipelines. Initiated platform use as a potential testbed for post-quantum cryptographic evaluations (NIST PQC candidates). Delivered scalable internal tooling across global teams in China, Singapore, Spain, and the US. Drove secure software design decisions and supported engineers across cybersecurity and development units.
Developed internal software as part of an international team. Gained experience with larger enterprise codebases, working in Scrum and applying Secure Coding practices.
Built websites, small-scale software, and maintained IT infrastructure for clients. Projects include reiterhof-kinderhilfe.de, blauersalon-lu.de, and hergt-transporte.de.
Focus on cryptography, offensive security, and secure software engineering.
Studied mathematics before transitioning to Cyber Security.
Graduated with a GPA of 1.1 and four distinctions.
